context.audience: Developers building voice interfaces and transcription features, product teams adding speech capabilities to existing applications, accessibility-focused developers implementing voice control
pain_points: Choosing between real-time and batch transcription APIs for different use cases
Handling multiple languages, accents, and noisy audio environments
Integrating text-to-speech with natural-sounding voices into web applications
Managing latency for real-time voice conversations with AI
Cost management for high-volume audio processing workloads
